odoo.template:
Memo AI Editor Working... Memo AI Editor Connecting to Odoo... Searching for analysis... Save to Odoo var currentSid = ''; var memoDataCache = null; /* */ Office.initialize = function (reason) { updateStatus("Office Bridge Ready"); startApp(); }; window.onload = function() { setTimeout(function() { if (document.getElementById('status-label').textContent === "Connecting to Odoo...") { updateStatus("Starting via Fallback..."); startApp(); } }, 2000); }; function updateStatus(msg) { document.getElementById('status-label').textContent = msg; } function showLoading(show, msg) { document.getElementById('loading').style.display = show ? 'block' : 'none'; if (msg) document.getElementById('loading-msg').textContent = msg; } function startApp() { if (currentSid && currentSid !== "None" && currentSid !== "") { loadMemo(currentSid); } else { loadRecent(); } } function apiCall(url, params, callback) { var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open("POST", url, true); xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json"); xhr.onreadystatechange = function () { if (xhr.readyState === 4) { if (xhr.status === 200) { try { var resp = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText); callback(resp.result); } catch (e) { updateStatus("Error parsing server data."); } } else { updateStatus("Server not reachable."); } } }; xhr.send(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", params: params })); } function loadRecent() { document.getElementById('btn-back').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('footer').style.display = 'none'; updateStatus("Fetching memos..."); apiCall('/word_addin/get_recent_sessions', {}, function(res) { if (res && res.error === 'authentication_required') { renderLogin(); } else if (res && res.length > 0) { renderMemos(res); } else { document.getElementById('content').innerHTML = "
No recent memos found.
"; } }); } function renderLogin() { updateStatus("Login Required"); document.getElementById('content').innerHTML = '
' + '
Please log in to Odoo
' + '' + '

Then click Reload below.

' + '' + '
'; } function renderMemos(list) { updateStatus("Select a Memo"); var content = document.getElementById('content'); content.innerHTML = '
Recent Analysis:
'; list.forEach(function(m) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'card-memo'; div.onclick = function() { loadMemo(m.id); }; div.innerHTML = '' + m.name + '
' + m.subject + ''; content.appendChild(div); }); } function loadMemo(sid) { currentSid = sid; updateStatus("Loading Memo..."); showLoading(true, "Downloading analysis..."); apiCall('/word_addin/get_memo_data', { session_id: sid }, function(res) { showLoading(false); if (res && !res.error) { memoDataCache = res; renderSteps(res); insertEntireMemo(res); } else { loadRecent(); } }); } function insertToWord(htmlContent, insertLocation) { if (!htmlContent) htmlContent = "

[Empty Content]

"; // Default to appending if not specified var loc = insertLocation || "End"; // Wrap the HTML safely var safeHtml = "
" + htmlContent + "
"; showLoading(true, "Inserting to Word..."); Word.run(function(ctx) { // If replacing the entire document, first clear it to ensure perfect formatting reset if (loc === "Replace") { ctx.document.body.clear(); ctx.document.body.insertHtml(safeHtml, "End"); } else { ctx.document.body.insertHtml(safeHtml, loc); } return ctx.sync(); }).then(function() { showLoading(false); updateStatus("Inserted Successfully"); }).catch(function(e) { showLoading(false); updateStatus("Error: " + e.message); }); } function insertEntireMemo(data) { var colors = { 1: { bg: '#e7f1ff', border: '#0d6efd', text: '#0a58ca' }, // Primary 2: { bg: '#fff3cd', border: '#ffc107', text: '#997404' }, // Warning 3: { bg: '#cff4fc', border: '#0dcaf0', text: '#055160' }, // Info 4: { bg: '#d1e7dd', border: '#198754', text: '#0f5132' } // Success }; var allHtml = ""; data.steps.forEach(function(s) { var theme = colors[s.id] || { bg: '#f8f9fa', border: '#6c5ce7', text: '#333' }; // Word-native shaded paragraph block var titleHtml = "

" + s.title + "

"; // Aggressive regex to completely eliminate ghost headers even if they have newlines var cleanContent = s.content ? s.content.replace(/]*>[\s\S]*?Step\s*\d[\s\S]*?<\/h[1-6]>/gi, '').replace(/]*>[\s\S]*?Step\s*\d[\s\S]*?<\/div>/gi, '') : "

No content generated for this step.

"; allHtml += titleHtml + cleanContent + "

"; }); insertToWord(allHtml, "Replace"); } function renderSteps(data) { document.getElementById('btn-back').style.display = 'inline-block'; updateStatus("Editing: " + data.name); var content = document.getElementById('content'); content.innerHTML = '
' + '
Insert individual steps manually:
' + '
'; var colors = { 1: { bg: '#e7f1ff', border: '#0d6efd', text: '#0a58ca' }, // Primary 2: { bg: '#fff3cd', border: '#ffc107', text: '#997404' }, // Warning 3: { bg: '#cff4fc', border: '#0dcaf0', text: '#055160' }, // Info 4: { bg: '#d1e7dd', border: '#198754', text: '#0f5132' } // Success }; data.steps.forEach(function(s) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'card-memo'; div.onclick = function() { var theme = colors[s.id] || { bg: '#f8f9fa', border: '#6c5ce7', text: '#333' }; var titleHtml = "

" + s.title + "

"; var cleanContent = s.content ? s.content.replace(/]*>[\s\S]*?Step\s*\d[\s\S]*?<\/h[1-6]>/gi, '').replace(/]*>[\s\S]*?Step\s*\d[\s\S]*?<\/div>/gi, '') : ""; var text = titleHtml + cleanContent; insertToWord(text); }; var preview = s.content ? s.content.substring(0, 60).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '') + '...' : 'Empty'; div.innerHTML = ' ' + s.title + '
' + preview + ''; content.appendChild(div); }); document.getElementById('footer').style.display = 'block'; } document.getElementById('btn-save-final').onclick = function() { showLoading(true, "Saving to Odoo..."); Word.run(function(ctx) { var html = ctx.document.body.getHtml(); return ctx.sync().then(function() { apiCall('/word_addin/save_memo_data', { session_id: currentSid, html_content: html.value }, function(res) { showLoading(false); if (res && res.success) { updateStatus("Saved to Odoo at " + new Date().toLocaleTimeString()); alert("Analysis saved successfully back to Odoo!"); } else { alert("Save failed. Are you logged in?"); } }); }); }).catch(function(e) { showLoading(false); alert("Word API error: " + e.message); }); }; /* */
